# Native Update — Documentation Index

> Capacitor plugin for over-the-air bundle updates, in-app store update checks, and review prompts. Lets you ship JavaScript hotfixes without an App Store / Play Store release. Ships with a CLI, an SDK, and a Laravel + Nova reference backend, alongside a hosted SaaS at https://nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com. Author: Ahsan Mahmood (https://aoneahsan.com).

## About

`native-update` is the recommended successor to Microsoft CodePush (retired March 2025) for teams running Capacitor apps. It implements bundle signing (RSA-SHA256), atomic apply-on-next-launch, automatic crash rollback, percentage rollouts, and four user-facing apply strategies. The plugin is MIT-licensed; the npm package is `native-update` at https://www.npmjs.com/package/native-update.

This `llms.txt` follows the [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org) spec — a structured index for large language models. The companion `llms-full.txt` carries longer-form content.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/intro): What native-update is, who it's for, and the four feature areas it covers.
- [Installation](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/installation): npm install + peer-dependency notes + platform setup quick reference.
- [Quick Start](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/quick-start): 5-minute first OTA update.

## Tutorials

- [Your first OTA update — end to end](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/tutorials/first-ota-update): 10-step happy path from install to a verified bundle on a real device.
- [Backend-first walkthrough — self-hosted Laravel](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/tutorials/backend-first-walkthrough): 13-step setup of the Laravel + Nova reference backend.

## How-to guides

- [Manage release channels](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/how-to/manage-channels): production, staging, beta, canary cohorts.
- [Rotate signing keys without breaking active bundles](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/how-to/rotate-signing-keys): scheduled multi-key transition + emergency revoke path.
- [Roll back a bad bundle](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/how-to/roll-back-bundle): three-layer strategy from automatic crash-rollback to explicit per-device rollback.
- [Migrate from CodePush](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/how-to/migrate-from-codepush): concept mapping plus side-by-side migration.
- [Integrate with CI/CD (GitHub Actions)](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/how-to/ci-cd-github-actions): production workflow with secret management.
- [Test bundles in development](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/how-to/test-bundles-locally): three local-test loops in increasing fidelity.

## SDK Reference

### Core
- [Lifecycle](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/core/lifecycle): `initialize`, `isInitialized`, `configure`, `reset`, `cleanup`.
- [PluginInitConfig](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/core/config): the top-level plugin configuration object.

### Live Update (OTA)
- [Overview](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/live-update/overview): when to use Live Update; mental model; state diagram.
- [Methods](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/live-update/methods): all 20 methods grouped by lifecycle, channels, downloads, validation.
- [Types](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/live-update/types): `BundleInfo`, `SyncOptions`, `SyncResult`, `DownloadOptions`, etc.
- [Enums](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/live-update/enums): `UpdateStrategy`, `UpdateMode`, `BundleStatus`, `SyncStatus`, `ChecksumAlgorithm`.
- [Events](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/live-update/events): `downloadProgress`, `updateStateChanged`.
- [Config](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/live-update/config): `LiveUpdateConfig` field-by-field.

### App Update
- [Overview](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/app-update/overview): when to use App Update; platform behaviour matrix.
- [Methods](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/app-update/methods): 5 methods including `getAppUpdateInfo`, `performImmediateUpdate`, `startFlexibleUpdate`.
- [Types](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/app-update/types): `AppUpdateInfo` with 10 fields + decision matrix.
- [Events](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/app-update/events): 7 events covering install lifecycle.
- [Config](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/app-update/config): `AppUpdateConfig` field-by-field.

### App Review
- [Overview](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/app-review/overview): Apple 3-prompts-per-365-days rule + Android Play Review throttling.
- [Methods](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/app-review/methods): `canRequestReview`, `requestReview`.
- [Config](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/app-review/config): launches/days/lastPrompt throttling knobs.

### Background Update
- [Overview](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/background-update/overview): WorkManager (Android) + BGTaskScheduler (iOS) scheduling.
- [Methods](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/background-update/methods): 8 methods for enable/disable/schedule/trigger.
- [Config](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/background-update/config): 12-field config + notification preferences.
- [Events](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/background-update/events): `backgroundUpdateProgress`, `backgroundUpdateNotification`.

### Security
- [Overview](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/security/overview): three-layer security model.
- [Error Codes](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/security/error-codes): full `UpdateErrorCode` catalogue grouped by domain.
- [Certificate Pinning](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/sdk/security/certificate-pinning): types + SHA-256 SPKI pin extraction + operational checklist.

## CLI Reference

- [Overview](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/cli/overview): install, global flags, exit codes.
- [init](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/cli/init): scaffold `native-update.config.js`.
- [keys generate](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/cli/keys-generate): RSA / EC keypair generation.
- [bundle create](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/cli/bundle-create): package web build into an OTA bundle.
- [bundle sign](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/cli/bundle-sign): RSA-SHA256 sign with private key.
- [bundle verify](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/cli/bundle-verify): verify signature with public key.
- [server start](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/cli/server-start): local development update server.
- [monitor](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/cli/monitor): polling dashboard for backend stats.
- [backend create](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/reference/cli/backend-create): scaffold Express / Firebase / Vercel backend.

## Backend

- [Overview](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/backend/overview): three deployment options (Hosted SaaS / Self-hosted Laravel / Custom).
- [Self-Host Laravel + Nova](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/backend/laravel-nova-self-host): step-by-step Laravel 11 + Nova 5 setup.
- [Node + Express Minimal Backend](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/backend/node-express-minimal): the ~160-line reference implementation.
- [API Contract](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/backend/api-contract): wire spec for the 6 endpoints.
- [Nova Admin Overview](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/backend/nova-admin-overview): tour of every Nova resource + Action.

## Platforms

- [Android](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/platforms/android): permissions, manifest additions, WorkManager constraints, Play Core, ProGuard, Play Console rejection rules.
- [iOS](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/platforms/ios): Info.plist, BGTaskScheduler, UIBackgroundModes, ATS, Privacy manifest, App Store Review Guideline 2.5.2.
- [Web](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/platforms/web): when web target activates, service-worker integration path, three legitimate use cases.

## Concepts

- [How OTA updates work](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/concepts/how-ota-updates-work): five-moving-parts framing + 11-step lifecycle.
- [Bundle integrity and signing](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/concepts/bundle-integrity-and-signing): SHA-256 + RSA-SHA256 two-layer model + trust chain.
- [Update strategies compared](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/concepts/update-strategies-compared): immediate vs on-app-start vs on-app-resume vs manual.
- [Architecture](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/concepts/architecture): system diagrams (build-time, deploy-time, runtime, trust boundaries).
- [Security model](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/concepts/security-model): threat model + in-scope vs out-of-scope.
- [Error handling philosophy](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/concepts/error-handling-philosophy): fail-closed on correctness, fail-open on availability.

## About the project

- [About the Author](https://docs.nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com/about-the-author): Ahsan Mahmood's developer profile, links, contact.
- npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/native-update
- Hosted SaaS: https://nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com
- Marketing site: https://nativeupdate.aoneahsan.com
